{{Quote|Vengeance! Vengeance for genocide!|Drend Navett|<ref name="Specter of the Past" />}}
'''Drend Navett''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was a specialized covert operative working with the "[[Vengeance (organization)|Vengeance]]" unit of the [[Imperial Remnant]]. In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], he was [[Occupation of Myomar|stationed]] on the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Myomaran]]s, during [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] return.

In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], he was sent with "[[Vengeance (organization)|Vengeance]]" cell, an elite strike team of Imperial [[Agent/Legends|agents]]. His unit instigated several anti-[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] operations, including acts of sabotage and causing havoc in the protests. His cell was able to increase tensions, which would allow the [[Battle of Bothawui (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of]] [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] to commence, part of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]]'s plan to [[Caamas Document Crisis|destabilize]] the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] by implanting evidence that the Bothans assisted in the [[Caamas Firestorm]]– the largest Imperial genocide in history. However, during the unit's final task to sabotage the planetary shield generators, Navett died after a baby [[mawkren]], which had a bomb, blew up Navett. Despite his death, the battle was able to commence.

==Biography==
'''Drend Navett''' was an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agent who led the "[[Vengeance (organization)|Vengeance]]" cell during the [[Caamas Document]] crisis of [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. As leader of this organization, he participated in several anti-[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] operations, including acts of sabotage and the instigation of deadly riots, calculated to increase tensions within the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Navett was the agent who used a [[Nightstinger sporting blaster rifle|Xerrol Nightstinger]] during a riot on [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] in order to make it appear [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and a Bothan leader named [[Rayl'skar]] had fired on the rioters.<ref name="Specter of the Past" />

His final mission was to sabotage [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui's]] [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]] generators in the planetary capital, [[Drev'starn]]. During this mission, he and another agent, [[Klif]], opened a pet store—[[Exoticalia Pet Emporium]]—as a cover. Using this cover, he was easily able to obtain [[metalmite]]s which he was able to introduce to the shield generator buildings. When he and Klif offered to act as exterminators, they spread both insecticide and liquid nutrients. Afterward, with the help of two other agents ([[Pensin]] and [[Horvic]]) who were working at a nearby [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] restaurant, he allowed hungry baby [[mawkren]]s with explosives strapped to their backs to follow a power conduit into the generator buildings. This was a suicide mission: after the first wave of mawkren took out the main walls of the generator buildings, he had to accompany the second wave to destroy the generator itself. Navett was killed in the explosion.<ref name="Vision of the Future" />

Navett's mission was a success, even though harassment from [[Moranda Savich]] forced both unexpected delays and unplanned acceleration of operations. Even a fire which Savich set in his shop did nothing more than force him to begin his operations early. Navett would not collect any posthumous accolades for his efforts, however, as the [[Imperial Remnant]] went on to lose the ensuing [[Battle of Bothawui (Galactic Civil War)|Second Battle of Bothawui]] anyway.<ref name="Vision of the Future" />
